title: hydrocotyle thunbergiana
intro: Hydrocotyle thunbergiana, also known as lemongrass spikemoss, is a flowering plant species native to East Asia, characterized by its creeping stems and small white flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle thunbergiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. It can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in topical applications for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects.
